message:
feat(Python): Implement 6 more CPython Python/ modules in Zig

- getplatform.zig (178 lines) - Platform identification (darwin/linux/win32)
- getcopyright.zig (142 lines) - Copyright notice and license text
- getcompiler.zig (210 lines) - Compiler identification and build info
- getversion.zig (266 lines) - Python version info and comparison
- getopt.zig (455 lines) - Command line option parsing (getopt/getopt_long)
- hashtable.zig (568 lines) - Generic hash table with iterators

Total: 1819 lines of new implementation
